description: The Banda della Magliana was a mafia-type criminal organization based in Rome, Italy, active from the late 1970s until 1999. It unified the fragmented local underworld under a single structure, engaging in kidnappings, gambling, drug trafficking, and robberies. The group had connections with other Italian criminal organizations, Masonic lodges, far-right terrorists, and intelligence services. It was involved in several high-profile Italian historical events, including the Moro case and the disappearance of Emanuela Orlandi.

country_links.evidence_quote: un grosso traffico di sostanze stupefacenti in arrivo dalla Colombia
country_links.context: The organization sources drugs from Colombia, as indicated by a drug trafficking operation involving drugs arriving from Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: Morì in Croazia nel 1998, dov'era latitante.
country_links.context: A member of the organization died in Croatia while on the run.

country_links.evidence_quote: Salomone venne poi arrestato in Danimarca nel 2005
country_links.context: The organization's member Emidio Salomone was arrested in Denmark in 2005, indicating the organization's presence or activity there.

country_links.evidence_quote: favorito l'elezione del senatore nel collegio estero di Stoccarda
country_links.context: The organization's associates helped elect a senator in the overseas constituency of Stuttgart.

country_links.evidence_quote: un grosso traffico di sostanze stupefacenti in arrivo dalla ... Guatemala
country_links.context: The organization sources drugs from Guatemala, as indicated by a drug trafficking operation involving drugs arriving from Guatemala.

country_links.evidence_quote: nata ed operante principalmente a Roma e nel resto d' Italia
country_links.context: The organization operated primarily in Rome and throughout Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: viene resa pubblica la notizia della sua morte in un ospedale di Nairobi, in Kenya
country_links.context: A killer linked to the organization died in a hospital in Nairobi, Kenya.

country_links.evidence_quote: viene arrestato in un lussuoso attico di Alicante in Spagna il 76enne Fausto Pellegrinetti, appartenente alla nuova Banda della Magliana
country_links.context: The organization's member Fausto Pellegrinetti was arrested in Spain after being a fugitive, indicating the organization's presence there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Enrico Mariotti, il basista, verrà beccato a Londra nel 1995 ed estradato solo nel 2007
country_links.context: An associate of the organization, Enrico Mariotti, was arrested in London and later extradited.

country_links.evidence_quote: Arrestato il 24 gennaio 1992 a Caracas , pochi giorni dopo la sua estradizione in Italia , decise di intraprendere un percorso di collaborazione con la giustizia.
country_links.context: A member of the organization was arrested in Caracas.
